message:
fix(render): clear destination on partial wide char in copy_from

When copy_from copies only the head of a wide character (e.g., '中')
but the tail falls outside the source rect, the Buffer::set atomicity
check silently rejects the write. This left the old destination content
as a visual artifact.

Fix: detect when a wide char's tail extends beyond the copy region and
write a default (empty) cell instead, ensuring the destination is always
updated to reflect the source content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
